update.releaseNotes:
v5.4.9 - Changelog
New --- - Add conditional energy-based selection for post-race event options under the `Training Event Settings` page in the `Special Event Overrides` section. - Add options to set separate racing strategies per distance under the `Racing Settings` page. - Add dedicated mood display to the Remote Log Viewer. - Add a milestone-based stat pacing system under the `Training Settings` page so the bot evaluates training progress proportionally to the current year rather than against absolute end-game targets. - Adds a failure fallback mechanism to training analysis that detects and corrects potentially incorrect OCR readings.
Adjustments --- - Conserve energy items (e.g., Energy Drink MAX/EX) for emergency race recovery at 3+ consecutive races. - Conserve at least one cupcake for potential Royal Kale Juice usage. - Ignore consecutive race limit on Late December turns. - Improves the Trackblazer scenario's Finale phase with smarter training fallbacks and a reworked item usage strategy for `Cleat Hammers`, `Glow Sticks` and `Reset Whistles`.
Fixes --- - Fix `Remote Log Viewer` from not updating the energy level + mood after using the `Royal Kale Juice`.
